message: [cursor] Property carousel: merge fetched+cached photos, Street View fallback, img onError
Live coaching: always-visible 3 NEPQ questions + 3 Voss labels in yellow
[cursor] Close implementation gaps: dead phone auto-mark, dead lead dispo, consent cleanup, dossier placeholder, missed queue retry, phone cycling
[cursor] Dead phone UX fix, Dead Phone disposition, remove call consent blocker
Tighten legal search and rewire dossier deep crawl
[cursor] Task UX polish — filter Unknown Owner, show phone in dashboard, enrich generic titles in syncLeadToTask
[cursor] Task system UX overhaul — identity, context, accountability, friction reduction
[cursor] Fix client file modal positioning — account for sidebar width
Harden live coach and call notes polling
perf: speed up live coaching — faster polling, shorter cooldowns, token cap
System hardening: silent failure fixes, webhook auth, image config, task titles, Twilio provider
[cursor] Task UX overhaul — click opens lead modal, lead name primary, call button, phone in API
[cursor] Search result click opens lead modal + surface error states instead of silent failures
[cursor] Dialer phone cycling, dead phone marking, stage controls, default lead filter
fix: zip NOT NULL constraint causing all Add New Lead 500 errors
debug: return actual error details in prospects POST 500 response
[cursor] Fix Save Lead 500 — remove owner_phone2 from property upsert (column does not exist in DB, moved to owner_flags)
Unified task system with bidirectional sync, chip-based setter, and calendar view
[cursor] Fix Save Lead 500 error — pass Bricked data from modal enrichment to API, skip redundant server-side re-fetch that was timing out the serverless function

[cursor] Make nationwide property search instant — open modal immediately with address, fetch Bricked enrichment in background. Previously blocked UI for 5-15s waiting for Bricked API before opening the modal.

[cursor] Fix legal search crawlers to submit actual searches + enlarge detail dropdown. Recorder now uses Firecrawl actions to fill/submit the search form instead of scraping the landing page. Courts crawler constructs a direct WA Courts search URL with the owner name. Liens crawler uses targeted web searches. Detail rows bumped from 11px to 14px (text-sm).
[cursor] Fix equity display on dialer card — fall through to owner_flags data when equity_percent is null, compute from ARV minus loan balance, remove Owed column
[cursor] Fix duplicate siteUrl declaration in browser voice route

[cursor] Fix outbound calls dropping — Twilio signature validation used req.url (Vercel internal hostname) instead of NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL (custom domain). Signature always failed, returning 403 JSON instead of TwiML, causing immediate hangup.

[cursor] Fix Legal tab visibility + persist deep crawl results across tab switches. Legal tab was filtered out by local PRIMARY_TAB_IDS. Deep crawl now saves categorized results to owner_flags so they reload on mount.
